name: Chilled Minted Melon Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon coarsely chopped mint leaves or
1/2 medium honeydew melon, (about 5-pound size), cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water, honey and mint to boiling; remove from heat.
2. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Pour the honey mixture into a blender or food processor; add melon and lime juice.
4. Cover and blend until smooth.
5. Pour into a medium glass bowl or pitcher; stir in milk.
6. Cover and refrigerate about 3 hours or until chilled.
7. Stir before serving.
8. Garnish with additional mint leaves if desired.
Makes 6 servings
